mission.intent: Refresh hexa-weave domain doc body to reflect cycle 7-8 milestones: lean4 sorry-free, 7 named axioms (Felgner decomposed), Foundation/{Strand,Axioms}.lean shared refactor, F-D-3 deadline-miss probability burndown 60-75% -> 50-58%, F-CL-JOINT-9 SCOPE-NARROW + F-MANUAL-LOGIN, papers/hexa-weave-formal-mechanical-w2 Option-E first paper, MVP W3+W4 spec progress (35%).
mission.scope_out_rationale: scope-out sections are stable across cycles 1-8; no claim or invariant changed. Editing them would inflate the diff without increasing fidelity.

modified_files.change: §6 cycle 1-8 milestone trace table prepended; §7 added MECHANICAL + LINT axes (8 of 9 PASS, CHI2 DEFER); §9 metrics refreshed with cycle 8 actuals (sorry=0, 7 axioms, F-D-3 50-58%, +201 LoC Foundation/Axioms); §10 added measurable claims 4 (3 falsifiers F-CL-FORMAL-4 a/b/c) + 5 (3 falsifiers F-MANUAL-LOGIN, F-USER-GATE-W5, F-USER-GATE-ZENODO); §11 added Lean toolchain, mathlib pin, Felgner/Hardy-Wright/Robin/Wigert citation rows, lean4-n6 sister directory, OpenFold v2.2.0; §12 expanded into cycle 1-9 actual + cycle 9+ planned table including Mk.X TRANSCEND chain, F-MANUAL-LOGIN deadline 2026-04-29 24:00 UTC, F-TP5-b 90-day MVP gate 2026-07-28; §15 added 6 new reference rows (cosmological L4-L7 chain, W1-W6 proposals, papers/, lean4-n6 mechanical body).
